suggestions.label: Model response
suggestions.text: Can you show me a model essay introduction for a Module A question?

suggestions.label: Test me
suggestions.text: Give me a practice question on my prescribed text.

suggestions.label: Explain
suggestions.text: Explain what 'textual integrity' means and how to reference it in an essay.

suggestions.label: Past paper
suggestions.text: Give me an HSC English Advanced past paper essay question.

suggestions.label: Check my writing
suggestions.text: Check my essay paragraph: [paste your paragraph here]

suggestions.label: What to study
suggestions.text: Based on my progress, what should I focus on today?

quickActions.label: Model response
quickActions.text: Show me a model essay response.

quickActions.label: Test me
quickActions.text: Give me a practice essay question.

quickActions.label: Past paper
quickActions.text: Give me an HSC English Advanced past paper question.
